title: (Nonrecord) Async Prefetching
author: SirSaltySalmon

data.description: Asynchronous prefetching of training and validation batches to overlap CPU data preparation and host-to-device transfers with GPU compute, reducing GPU idle time and pipeline bubbles.

parameters.training_batches: Background thread builds next pinned CPU batch while GPU runs current step
parameters.H2D_transfers: Optional dedicated CUDA copy stream with pinned memory, waits for H2D before forward
parameters.validation: Prefetch thread for pinned CPU batches; double-buffered H2D with copy stream and events; default BPB byte counting on CPU

data.description: Diagnostics added to measure timing breakdown of batch CPU, H2D, forward/backward/optimizer, and validation steps with logging.

parameters.TRAINING_TIMING_BREAKDOWN: Logs timing breakdown, disables prefetch/overlap for interpretability
parameters.VAL_BYTECOUNT_DEVICE: Defaults to cpu in improved script, can be set to cuda to mirror baseline

novel_contributions: Overlap CPU data preparation and host-to-device copies with GPU compute to reduce GPU idle time.
Use background threads to asynchronously prefetch training and validation batches with pinned CPU memory.
Introduce optional dedicated CUDA copy streams for host-to-device transfers with synchronization.
Double-buffered validation batch transfers to overlap data movement with forward passes.
Add detailed timing diagnostics to measure and analyze the impact of prefetching and overlapping.
Automatic disabling of prefetch/overlap features when timing diagnostics are enabled for clearer measurements.
